[[Evangelion 2.0 (Translation)|Page 1]], [[Evangelion 2.0 (Translation) Page 2|Page 2]], [[Evangelion 2.0 (Translation) Page 4|Page 4]]


{| cellpadding="6" border="1"
! Timestamp
! Speaker
! Dialogue
|-
| 00:49:47,914 --> 00:49:50,880
| Asuka
| If it's for that stupid Shinji then it should be a little mild, I guess... 
|-
| 00:49:51,881 --> 00:49:53,411
| Misato	
| I'm home!
|-
| 00:49:53,412 --> 00:49:56,341
| Asuka
| Huh? Misato, you're back early. 
|-
| 00:49:56,342 --> 00:49:58,885
| Misato
| Yes, I just got back from Headquarters.
|-
| 00:49:58,886 --> 00:50:01,032
| Misato
| I'm going to bathe, change my clothes, then head back. 
|-
| 00:50:04,989 --> 00:50:07,299
| Misato
| Well well, what do we have here?
|-
| 00:50:07,300 --> 00:50:10,188
| Misato
| Asuka, are you cooking dinner for Shin, too? 
|-
| 00:50:11,518 --> 00:50:14,515
| Asuka
| That's not it! Uh, it's for that girl... what's-her-name, Hikari! 
|-
| 00:50:15,376 --> 00:50:18,476
| Misato
| It's nice that Rei and even Asuka are becoming interested in the opposite sex.
|-
| 00:50:18,511 --> 00:50:21,121
| Asuka
| What do you mean? The favorite isn't doing this too, is she?! 
|-
| 00:50:21,122 --> 00:50:24,708
| Misato
| Well, yeah. It seems that Rei has a long term project to finish. 
|-
| 00:50:25,185 --> 00:50:25,685
| Asuka
| What's that?
|-
| 00:50:26,525 --> 00:50:31,432
| Misato
| She wants to play Cupid between Commander Ikari and Shin so they can develop a bond. 
|-
| 00:50:32,005 --> 00:50:36,425
| Misato
| Her strategy is a home-cooked dinner.
|-
| 00:50:36,426 --> 00:50:38,650
| Misato
| It's an effective, straightforward way.
|-
| 00:50:39,372 --> 00:50:44,137
| Misato
| She really wants father and son to get along. It requires a lot of effort on her part.
|-
| 00:50:44,138 --> 00:50:46,640
| Asuka
| She's doing this for stupid Shinji...
|-
| 00:50:46,675 --> 00:50:49,875
| Misato
| It's kind of a surprise for Shin, so don't let him find out. 
|-
| 00:50:51,442 --> 00:50:53,600
| Asuka
| Of course I'M not going to say anything! 
|-
| 00:51:16,681 --> 00:51:18,038
| Misato
| Vanished?!
|-
| 00:51:18,039 --> 00:51:21,351
| Misato
| Eva Unit-04 and the entire Second Branch disappeared?!
|-
| 00:51:21,838 --> 00:51:24,374
| Aoba
| There's no data from ground zero. 
|-
| 00:51:25,847 --> 00:51:27,108
| Misato
| This is awful.
|-
| 00:51:27,109 --> 00:51:31,693
| Hyuga
| We have satellite confirmation of the A.T. Field collapsing, but the details are unknown. 
|-
| 00:51:31,694 --> 00:51:34,419
| Misato
| It seems Unit-04 was at the center of the explosion...
|-
| 00:51:34,643 --> 00:51:36,909
| Misato
| But our own Eva are okay, right?
|-
| 00:51:36,910 --> 00:51:37,910
| Maya
| Unit-04 was-
|-
| 00:51:39,069 --> 00:51:45,738
| Ritsuko
| The problems at the time of activation can be attributed to the fact that Unit-04 was a new type of self-contained testbed.
|-
| 00:51:46,500 --> 00:51:47,440
| Ritsuko
| ...Or so it seems.
|-
| 00:51:47,441 --> 00:51:52,922
| Maya
| The information from Nerv's North American branch is restricted, even for Dr. Akagi. 
|-
| 00:51:52,923 --> 00:51:53,923
| Misato
| I'm aware of it...
|-
| 00:51:54,797 --> 00:51:56,480
| Fuyutsuki
| Eva Unit-04...
|-
| 00:51:56,481 --> 00:52:01,075
| Fuyutsuki
| The purpose of the experiment was to gather data about next generation development.
|-
| 00:52:01,076 --> 00:52:04,791
| Fuyutsuki
| It's not surprising that this happened, but... 
|-
| 00:52:07,809 --> 00:52:09,481
| Kaji
| Was this really an accident?
|-
| 00:52:11,701 --> 00:52:13,947
| Toji
| Ma'am, three please!
|-
| 00:52:17,167 --> 00:52:19,683
| Shinji
| Toji, it's not like you to treat us. 
|-
| 00:52:19,684 --> 00:52:24,493
| Toji
| Shinji, don't be so serious just 'cause I felt like treatin' you. 
|-
| 00:52:24,494 --> 00:52:28,122
| Kensuke
| His sister's health is better. I guess that's why he's being nice. 
|-
| 00:52:28,622 --> 00:52:31,931
| Toji
| Shut up! You don't need to tell him that much! Moron!
|-
| 00:52:37,164 --> 00:52:38,655
| Kensuke
| Hey, Ikari. 
|-
| 00:52:38,770 --> 00:52:39,336
| Shinji
| Huh?
|-
| 00:52:39,337 --> 00:52:41,727
| Kensuke
| Isn't Unit-03 coming to Japan? 
|-
| 00:52:41,728 --> 00:52:44,043
| Shinji 
| Is it? I didn't know that. 
|-
| 00:52:44,044 --> 00:52:49,160
| Kensuke
| It's rumored they're suddenly being forced to do the activation experiment by the United States.
|-
| 00:52:49,161 --> 00:52:52,309
| Kensuke
| Well, there's lots of unknown information on this end.
|-
| 00:52:52,310 --> 00:52:54,220
| Kensuke
| I just wonder who will pilot. 
|-
| 00:52:54,221 --> 00:52:56,978
| Shinji
| I haven't heard anything about it. 
|-
| 00:52:58,056 --> 00:53:01,717
| Kensuke
| Being a pilot sounds great! I wonder if I could become one?!
|-
| 00:53:01,718 --> 00:53:05,262
| Shinji
| Misato is the one who decides that, not me...
|-
| 00:53:05,263 --> 00:53:06,568
| Toji
| Damn! I lost. 
|-
| 00:53:17,335 --> 00:53:22,108
| Seele
| Evangelion Unit-05 was recently lost. 
|-
| 00:53:22,109 --> 00:53:25,107
| Seele
| Now Unit-04 has been lost, as well.
|-
| 00:53:25,142 --> 00:53:29,973
| Gendo
| The loss of both units will be a hindrance to the project's execution. However... 
|-
| 00:53:29,974 --> 00:53:31,444
| Seele
| It is within the scope of amendment. 
|-
| 00:53:31,448 --> 00:53:32,949
| Seele
| There won't be any problems.
|-
| 00:53:32,950 --> 00:53:37,789
| Seele
| The U.S. government has inevitably presented you with Unit-03. 
|-
| 00:53:37,824 --> 00:53:40,398
| Seele
| Your country's government must cooperate. 
|-
| 00:53:40,433 --> 00:53:43,971
| Seele
| It is a state-of-the-art unit, a formidable military force.
|-
| 00:53:44,432 --> 00:53:47,099
| Gendo
| Even now we are carrying out the Angels' annihilation. 
|-
| 00:53:47,100 --> 00:53:50,122
| Gendo
| We cannot rely on an untested unit.
|-
| 00:53:50,123 --> 00:53:54,511
| Gendo
| If the supplemental revised budget for the repairs to Unit-00 could be approved-
|-
| 00:53:54,512 --> 00:53:57,634
| Seele
| The role of the prototype model is already ending.
|-
| 00:53:57,635 --> 00:53:59,244
| Seele
| There's no need.
|-
| 00:53:59,519 --> 00:54:03,061
| Seele
| Indeed, there are other matters that should be given priority. 
|-
| 00:54:02,728 --> 00:54:06,051
| Seele
| The true Evangelion we desire...
|-
| 00:54:06,052 --> 00:54:10,192
| Seele
| With its birth and Lilith's resurrection, the hour of our covenant will arrive.
|-
| 00:54:10,193 --> 00:54:14,881
| Seele
| By then we must perform the necessary ceremonies. 
|-
| 00:54:14,882 --> 00:54:18,020
| Seele
| For the Human Instrumentality Project. 
|-
| 00:54:18,021 --> 00:54:22,261
| Gendo
| I understand. Everything will go according to Seele's scenario.
|-
| 00:54:25,467 --> 00:54:27,121
| Gendo
| The true Evangelion...
|-
| 00:54:29,102 --> 00:54:34,737
| Gendo
| Its completion will be ushered in by the current body containing Unit-01. 
|-
| 00:54:34,738 --> 00:54:37,557
| Fuyutsuki
| The Mark-06, isn't it?
|-
| 00:54:37,558 --> 00:54:42,995
| Fuyutsuki
| This means what they are trying to create is not a false God, but a true God at last?
|-
| 00:54:42,996 --> 00:54:43,996
| Gendo
| Yes.
|-
| 00:54:43,997 --> 00:54:47,856
| Gendo
| We must hasten the awakening of Unit-01.
|-
| 00:54:50,222 ---> 00:54:52,777
| Operator
| Eva Unit-02's core unit separation complete.
|-
| 00:54:52,849 --> 00:54:55,703
| Asuka
| Why does my Unit-02 have to be sealed?! 
|-
| 00:54:55,704 --> 00:54:58,162
| Ritsuko
| You know about the Vatican Treaty, don't you? 
|-
| 00:54:58,163 --> 00:55:00,620
| Ritsuko
| This is the condition for us receiving Unit-03. 
|-
| 00:55:00,621 --> 00:55:03,534
| Asuka
| If that's the case, you should put away Unit-00 since it's being repaired! 
|-
| 00:55:03,535 --> 00:55:07,381
| Maya
| Europe hasn't given us clearance for possession of Unit-02. 
|-
| 00:55:07,382 --> 00:55:09,584
| Maya
| Until that happens, there's nothing we can do. 
|-
| 00:55:09,585 --> 00:55:11,654
| Ritsuko
| As of now, there is no pilot for it.
|-
| 00:55:11,655 --> 00:55:15,441
| Ritsuko
| Until we receive notice from the Europeans, we have to follow orders.
|-
| 00:55:15,442 --> 00:55:18,228
| Asuka
| With the exception of me piloting, you mean. 
|-
| 00:55:18,229 --> 00:55:19,811
| Ritsuko
| The Evas are combat weapons. 
|-
| 00:55:19,812 --> 00:55:22,044
| Ritsuko
| Everything has a backup prepared.
|-
| 00:55:22,545 --> 00:55:24,404
| Ritsuko
| Including the pilots.
|-
| 00:55:24,513 --> 00:55:25,986
| Asuka
| No way...
|-
| 00:55:28,105 --> 00:55:31,460
| Asuka
| There's no other place in world for me.
|-
| 00:55:54,136 --> 00:55:57,248
| Rei
| Eva is the mirror of your heart. 
|-
| 00:55:57,283 --> 00:55:58,555
| Asuka
| What did you say?!
|-
| 00:55:58,659 --> 00:56:03,524
| Rei
| You shouldn't depend on the Eva.
You can be happy without piloting it.
|-
| 00:56:03,802 --> 00:56:06,973
| Asuka
| Stop being so arrogant just because you're the favorite!
|-
| 00:56:08,486 --> 00:56:13,176
| Asuka
| I'm a prodigy! I became an Eva pilot with my own strength, not with whom I know!
|-
| 00:56:13,186 --> 00:56:15,630
| Asuka
| I'm different from the rest of you! 
|-
| 00:56:15,665 --> 00:56:18,573
| Rei
| I merely have a bond.
|-
| 00:56:17,977 --> 00:56:21,004
| Rei
| Eva bonds me to other people.
|-
| 00:56:21,005 --> 00:56:27,532
| Asuka
| Shut up! You're just an obedient little doll that does whatever Commander Ikari wants, aren't you?! 
|-
| 00:56:27,533 --> 00:56:29,364
| Rei
| I am not a doll. 
|-
| 00:56:29,365 --> 00:56:30,861
| Asuka
| You're a doll!
|-
| 00:56:31,396 --> 00:56:32,876
| Asuka
| Let me teach you a little something! 
|-
| 00:56:43,558 --> 00:56:46,672
| Asuka
| You have a lot of energy for a doll. 
|-
| 00:56:53,768 --> 00:56:56,969
| Asuka
| Just answer one thing for me. How do you feel about that idiot? 
|-
| 00:56:56,970 --> 00:56:58,247
| Rei
| "Idiot"?
|-
| 00:56:58,248 --> 00:57:00,711
| Asuka
| When I say idiot, it's obvious I mean stupid Shinji. 
|-
| 00:57:00,712 --> 00:57:01,922
| Rei
| Ikari-kun?
|-
| 00:57:01,957 --> 00:57:04,450
| Asuka
| So, how do you feel about him? 
|-
| 00:57:04,485 --> 00:57:05,964
| Rei
| I don't really know... 
|-
| 00:57:06,448 --> 00:57:08,116
| Asuka
| Why do Japanese have to be so...?!
|-
| 00:57:08,151 --> 00:57:09,660
| Asuka
| Just say what you feel already!
|-
| 00:57:10,000 --> 00:57:15,253
| Rei
| I don't know, but... I feel warm around Ikari-kun.
|-
| 00:57:15,288 --> 00:57:19,451
| Rei
| I want to feel warm towards him, as well. 
|-
| 00:57:19,486 --> 00:57:25,328
| Rei
| I think I want to feel warm about him getting along with Commander Ikari. 
|-
| 00:57:25,329 --> 00:57:26,329
| Asuka
| I get it.
|-
| 00:57:32,648 --> 00:57:35,530
| Asuka
| You really are a complete, ultra idiot.
|-
| 00:57:35,565 --> 00:57:37,764
| Asuka
| That means you love him!
|-
| 00:57:43,380 --> 00:57:45,284
| Shinji
| I'm looking forward to this dinner party.
|-
| 00:57:46,176 --> 00:57:49,574
| Shinji
| But I wonder if Ayanami's cooking will be okay?
|-
| 00:57:52,457 --> 00:57:55,336
| Shinji
| ...It'd be nice if father could come, too.
|-
| 00:58:00,271 --> 00:58:03,156
| Misato
| So this is the Dummy System...
|-
| 00:58:03,157 --> 00:58:07,93
| Hyuga
| It's only supposed to be a mere pilot aid, but it can independently exert control,
|-
| 00:58:07,931 --> 00:58:11,170
| Hyuga
| and generate an A.T. Field while unmanned.
|-
| 00:58:10,992 --> 00:58:14,445
| Hyuga
| Apparently it's more humane than forcing children to pilot.
|-
| 00:58:18,794 --> 00:58:24,460
| Misato
| This new Dummy System is really difficult to understand.
|-
| 00:58:24,890 --> 00:58:29,720
| Kaji
| Since it's coming from Golgotha Base, the details are still unknown.
|-
| 00:58:31,918 --> 00:58:35,630
| Misato
| To think something so dangerous will control the Eva... I don't like it!
|-
| 00:58:35,631 --> 00:58:39,486
| Kaji
| Do you think people should trust the Eva like that?
|-
| 00:58:39,521 --> 00:58:42,366
| Kaji
| It could give Shinji-kun confidence. No...
|-
| 00:58:42,367 --> 00:58:45,378
| Kaji
| It's for that reason he pilots, isn't it?
|-
| 00:58:45,695 --> 00:58:51,761
| Misato
| I'd prefer it if you had more information regarding the higher levels of Seele.
|-
| 00:58:53,296 --> 00:58:56,237
| Kaji
| Please don't go spying on their plans.
|-
| 00:58:56,238 --> 00:58:57,238
| Misato
| I don't intend to.
|-
| 00:58:57,239 --> 00:59:02,155
| Misato
| The Human Instrumentality Project... Why are they hiding it from Nerv?
|-
| 00:59:02,156 --> 00:59:03,156
| Kaji
| That's...
|-
| 00:59:06,706 --> 00:59:08,638
| Kaji
| I'd like to know that myself.
|-
| 00:59:11,625 --> 00:59:15,525
| Kaji
| We haven't dined together for a long time, and here we are talking about work.
|-
| 00:59:16,105 --> 00:59:17,851
| Misato
| It was different when we were students.
|-
| 00:59:18,386 --> 00:59:22,575
| Misato
| All these things are a damn burden.
|-
| 00:59:22,576 --> 00:59:26,275
| Kaji
| Selfish as we are, we cannot think only of ourselves.
|-
| 00:59:26,276 --> 00:59:30,773
| Misato
| Shinji and the others have much larger things to worry about.
|-
| 00:59:30,808 --> 00:59:33,765
| Kaji
| Yeah, the children carry a heavy burden.
|-
| 00:59:33,766 --> 00:59:37,265
| Kaji
| But, we still have to rely on them.
|-
| 00:59:43,263 --> 00:59:44,508
| Misato
| Yes...
|-
| 00:59:45,535 --> 00:59:49,943
| Misato
| Ah, I understand. I'll change the conclusion date.
|-
| 00:59:51,020 --> 00:59:51,882
| Kaji
| Rit-chan?
|-
| 00:59:51,883 --> 00:59:55,640
| Misato
| Yes. She's requesting I choose a test pilot for Unit-03.
|-
| 00:59:55,641 --> 00:59:57,860
| Kaji
| Personnel selection is your responsibility.
|-
| 00:59:57,861 --> 01:00:02,970
| Misato
| I'm aware of that, but the arrival of Unit-03 was postponed.
|-
| 01:00:04,907 --> 01:00:06,470
| Misato
| I just need one more day...
|-
| 01:00:06,505 --> 01:00:09,788
| Asuka
| Unit-03's test activation date...
|-
| 01:00:10,933 --> 01:00:13,069
| Asuka
| Isn't that date also the favorite's party?
|-
| 01:00:36,771 --> 01:00:39,406
| Ritsuko
| So, the decision lies with Asuka.
|-
| 01:00:40,313 --> 01:00:43,639
| Ritsuko
| Yeah, I'll be on the last flight to Matsushiro.
|-
| 01:00:43,640 --> 01:00:45,528
| Ritsuko
| Please take care, Maya.
|-
| 01:00:45,529 --> 01:00:46,529
| Maya
| Yes ma'am.
|-
| 01:00:47,776 --> 01:00:49,807
| Rei
| Umm, Dr. Akagi?
|-
| 01:00:52,106 --> 01:00:54,406
| Rei
| There is something I want you to tell the Second Girl.
|-
| 01:00:55,395 --> 01:00:56,516
| Rei
| Please.
|-
| 01:01:05,338 --> 01:01:10,454
| Tech
| You have one new message. First message...
|-
| 01:01:11,883 --> 01:01:14,501
| Ritsuko
| Alright, Rei. You can speak.
|-
| 01:01:26,770 --> 01:01:27,952
| Rei
| ...Thank you.
|-
| 01:01:31,295 --> 01:01:33,359
| Asuka
| Isn't she stupid!
|-
| 01:01:33,360 --> 01:01:35,254
| Asuka
| I just want to pilot Eva.
|-
| 01:01:38,408 --> 01:01:42,650
| Asuka
| If I like Unit-03, repaint it red.
|-
| 01:01:45,940 --> 01:01:47,487
| Hikari
| Good morning, Aida-kun.
|-
| 01:01:47,570 --> 01:01:48,750
| Kensuke
| Yes...
|-
| 01:01:48,758 --> 01:01:50,624
| Shinji
| Huh? Where's Toji?
|-
| 01:01:50,625 --> 01:01:52,799
| Kensuke
| At the Odawara Hospital today.
|-
| 01:01:52,800 --> 01:01:55,468
| Kensuke
| They discharged his little sister.
|-
| 01:01:55,469 --> 01:01:57,510
| Shinji
| Ah, I see.
|-
| 01:01:57,927 --> 01:01:59,363
| Kensuke
| I have a message from Toji.
|-
| 01:01:59,364 --> 01:02:04,081
| Kensuke
| "Thanks for thinking about my little sister!" is what he said.
|-
| 01:02:05,608 --> 01:02:08,084
| Kensuke
| It's really great, isn't it, Ikari.
|-
| 01:02:08,560 --> 01:02:09,770
| Shinji
| Yeah.
|-
| 01:02:10,370 --> 01:02:13,673
| Kensuke
| So, did you get invited to Ayanami's?
|-
| 01:02:14,674 --> 01:02:16,880
| Kensuke
| I really envy you!
|-
| 01:02:25,527 --> 01:02:29,652
| Tech
| Eva Unit-03 manned test activation director has arrived.
|-
| 01:02:29,653 --> 01:02:31,631
| Tech
| The current department supervisor has been relieved.
|-
| 01:02:31,631 --> 01:02:35,050
| Tech
| Restraint system checks complete.
|-
| 01:02:33,460 --> 01:02:35,800
| Tech
| Begin Umbilical Cable connection.
|-
| 01:02:38,051 --> 01:02:39,814
| Tech
| Connector connection confirmed.
|-
| 01:02:39,815 --> 01:02:41,339
| Tech
| Main energy source is loaded.
|-
| 01:02:41,340 --> 01:02:43,040
| Tech
| Internal voltage default values clear.
|-
| 01:02:44,742 --> 01:02:47,181
| Tech
| Entry plug is fixed in position.
|-
| 01:02:47,182 --> 01:02:50,353
| Tech
| Check list clear through 1350. No problems detected.
|-
| 01:02:50,354 --> 01:02:52,457
| Misato
| Roger. Begin countdown.
|-
| 01:02:52,458 --> 01:02:53,458
| Tech
| Begin countdown.
|-
| 01:02:53,459 --> 01:02:55,687
| Tech
| All ground crews evacuate.
|-
| 01:02:55,688 --> 01:02:57,930
| Tech
| Test pilot medical examinations complete.
|-
| 01:02:57,965 --> 01:03:00,252
| Tech
| She is currently waiting in the mobile control room.
|-
| 01:03:00,253 --> 01:03:02,460
| Misato
| It'll be a success for Ritsuko, there's no doubt.
|-
| 01:03:06,429 --> 01:03:09,018
| Misato
| A direct line? It must be Asuka.
|-
| 01:03:12,236 --> 01:03:14,672
| Misato
| What's wrong, Asuka? We have the test soon. 
|-
| 01:03:14,831 --> 01:03:18,153
| Asuka 
| I just wanted the two of us to chat, Misato.
|-
| 01:03:18,654 --> 01:03:24,803
| Misato
| Well, I never thanked you for before so, thank you.
|-
| 01:03:27,763 --> 01:03:28,857
| Asuka
| Thanking me is fine.
|-
| 01:03:30,475 --> 01:03:34,252
| Asuka
| It's my duty to help protect the ignorant masses since I'm an elite pilot.
|-
| 01:03:34,253 --> 01:03:37,146
| Asuka
| At first I didn't want to go to that dinner...
|-
| 01:03:37,147 --> 01:03:40,913
| Asuka
| Being with other people is fun, but it wears me out.
|-
| 01:03:40,914 --> 01:03:46,523
| Asuka
| I don't like to see other people happy but I like piloting Eva.
|-
| 01:03:46,524 --> 01:03:51,452
| Asuka
| I've always liked being alone, and I never needed close friends.
|-
| 01:03:51,453 --> 01:03:54,604
| Asuka
| Since the beginning, I've never had someone take care of me properly. 
|-
| 01:03:54,605 --> 01:03:59,740
| Asuka
| At first, I felt that being the top pilot at Nerv meant I could go to that dinner.
|-
| 01:03:59,741 --> 01:04:04,804
| Asuka
| But now, I realize it's good to be around other people.
|-
| 01:04:04,839 --> 01:04:07,586
| Asuka
| Although it seems like I can't fit in. 
|-
| 01:04:07,587 --> 01:04:08,911
| Misato
| That's not true. 
|-
| 01:04:08,912 --> 01:04:11,317
| Misato
| You're a nice person, Asuka.
|-
| 01:04:12,037 --> 01:04:17,088
| Asuka
| I think this is the first time I've felt comfortable talking with you, Misato.
|-
| 01:04:17,123 --> 01:04:21,276
| Asuka
| I had no idea it could feel so good to get this off my chest. 
|-
| 01:04:21,277 --> 01:04:26,289
| Misato
| This world is full of interesting things you need to learn.
|-
| 01:04:26,290 --> 01:04:27,993
| Misato
| You should have fun.
|-
| 01:04:30,494 --> 01:04:33,736
| Asuka
| Yeah. You're right. Thanks, Misato.
|-
| 01:04:34,237 --> 01:04:39,369
| Asuka
| By the way, I don't mind the red, but isn't this Test Plug Suit... 
|-
| 01:04:40,384 --> 01:04:41,895
| Asuka
| revealing a bit too much? 
|-
| 01:04:42,575 --> 01:04:44,105
| Tech
| Entry initiated...
|-
| 01:04:44,106 --> 01:04:45,106
| Tech
| Ionizing LCL. Pressure is nominal.
Begin First Stage connection.
|-
| 01:04:45,107 --> 01:04:50,687
| Tech
| No problems with plug sensors.
Numerical values are within measurement error range.
|-
| 01:04:51,943 --> 01:04:55,451
| Ritsuko
| Roger. Move onto Phase 2.
|-
| 01:04:55,452 --> 01:04:57,058
| Ritsuko
| Begin Second Stage connection.
|-
| 01:04:57,059 --> 01:05:01,146
| Asuka
| I see, I'm smiling now.
|-
| 01:05:17,353 --> 01:05:18,760
| Tech
| Plug depth is over 100. 
|-
| 01:05:18,761 --> 01:05:21,208
| Tech
| Mental contamination is critical. 
|-
| 01:05:21,209 --> 01:05:22,209
| Misato
| That fast?! How?
|-
| 01:05:22,210 --> 01:05:24,014
| Tech
| Pilot safety depth exceeded! 
|-
| 01:05:24,015 --> 01:05:27,654
| Ritsuko
| Restrain it! This is as far as we can go without our crew dying!
|-
| 01:05:27,655 --> 01:05:29,181
| Misato
| Abort the test! Cut the circuit!
|-
| 01:05:29,216 --> 01:05:32,151
| Tech
| It's impossible! There's a high-energy reaction in the body!
|-
| 01:05:33,153 --> 01:05:34,153
| Ritsuko
| It can't be... 
|-
| 01:05:34,866 --> 01:05:35,892
| Misato
| An Angel! 
|-
| 01:05:49,472 --> 01:05:51,814
| Shinji
| An explosion in Matsushiro...?
|-
| 01:05:59,015 --> 01:06:00,068
| Fuyutsuki
| What's the situation?
|-
| 01:06:00,069 --> 01:06:01,069
| Aoba
| Unknown.
|-
| 01:06:01,070 --> 01:06:04,380
| Aoba
| The explosion was centered on the test cage. We've confirmed the destruction of the facilities. 
|-
| 01:06:04,381 --> 01:06:07,279
| Fuyutsuki
| Send rescue teams and the Third Battalion. Take care of the situation before the JSSDF intervenes.
|-
| 01:06:09,541 --> 01:06:10,443
| Aoba
| Roger.
|-
| 01:06:10,444 --> 01:06:13,535
| Hyuga
| Unidentified moving object detected south-west of the epicenter.
|-
| 01:06:13,536 --> 01:06:14,536
| Hyuga
| Pattern orange.
|-
| 01:06:14,537 --> 01:06:16,579
| Hyuga
| We cannot confirm if it's an Angel. 
|-
| 01:06:17,115 --> 01:06:18,641
| Gendo
| Level 1 battle stations. 
|-
| 01:06:18,642 --> 01:06:19,642
| Fuyutsuki
| Ikari?!
|-
| 01:06:19,643 --> 01:06:22,113
| Gendo
| All hands, go to Level 1 battle stations.
|-
| 01:06:22,569 --> 01:06:24,807
| Gendo
| Unit-00 will remain in the repair cage.
|-
| 01:06:24,808 --> 01:06:28,010
| Gendo
| Launch Unit-01 with the Dummy Plug. We'll configure it later.
|-
| 01:06:32,010 --> 01:06:35,760 
| Tech
| The fifth tank battalion has now advanced 
to the eighteenth line of defense.
|-
| 01:06:35,180 --> 01:06:39,010
| Tech
| Main power extension cable connection work is 
expected to be completed in two minutes.
|-
| 01:06:39,010 --> 01:06:41,480
| Tech
| Supporting mobile strike force deployment completed.
|-
| 01:06:41,358 --> 01:06:43,845
| Shinji
| Umm, what happened to Misato-san, Asuka, and the others?
|-
| 01:06:41,650 --> 01:06:44,280
| Tech
| Supporting aerial forces, standby for further orders.
|-
| 01:06:43,846 --> 01:06:48,026
| Aoba
| Right now the rescue teams are moving in. Don't worry about it. 
|-
| 01:06:48,061 --> 01:06:54,126
| Shinji
| But how will we fight the Angel without Misato-san? 
|-
| 01:06:54,680 --> 01:06:59,832
| Hyuga
| We are following the chain of command.
Commander Ikari is taking direct command.
|-
| 01:06:59,833 --> 01:07:00,833
| Shinji
| My father?
|-
| 01:07:01,334 --> 01:07:02,664
| Aoba
| Visual received from the Tou region.
|-
| 01:07:02,665 --> 01:07:04,276
| Aoba
| Transferring to the main monitor.
|-
| 01:07:10,040 --> 01:07:11,314
| Fuyutsuki
| Just as we thought. 
|-
| 01:07:11,315 --> 01:07:15,573
| Gendo
| Transmit the deactivation signal. Force eject the entry plug. 
|-
| 01:07:18,188 --> 01:07:22,461
| Maya
| It's no use! It doesn't recognize either the deactivation signal or the plug ejection code. 
|-
| 01:07:22,462 --> 01:07:25,775
| Aoba
| An invasive structure that appears to be the core is confirmed surrounding the entry plug.
|-
| 01:07:25,776 --> 01:07:28,277
| Hyuga
| Pattern analysis is in! It's blue...
|-
| 01:07:28,278 --> 01:07:32,638
| Gendo
| Evangelion Unit-03 is hereby abandoned.
|-
| 01:07:32,639 --> 01:07:35,773
| Gendo
| Reclassify the target as the Ninth Angel. 
|-
| 01:07:36,401 --> 01:07:38,091
| Operator
| Target is approaching. 
|-
| 01:07:38,092 --> 01:07:40,016
| Operator
| All hands, prepare for surface combat. 
|-
| 01:07:40,017 --> 01:07:41,017
| Aoba
| Surface-to-surface combat in progress. 
|-
| 01:07:43,560 --> 01:07:46,881
| Shinji
| It can't be... an Angel? That's the Angel? 
|-
| 01:07:46,882 --> 01:07:49,409
| Gendo
| Correct. That's the target. 
|-
| 01:07:49,410 --> 01:07:56,066
| Shinji
| The target? But isn't that an Eva?
|-
| 01:07:49,910 --> 01:07:52,300
| Tech
| The target is now breaking through the second line of defense.
|-
| 01:07:52,300 --> 01:07:54,630
| Tech
| Fifth and sixth platoons, begin attack.
|-
| 01:07:56,567 --> 01:07:57,712
| Shinji
| It can't be... 
|-
| 01:07:58,184 --> 01:08:00,379
| Gendo
| The target is advancing.
|-
| 01:08:00,380 --> 01:08:01,380
| Gendo
| You will defeat it. 
|-
| 01:08:01,320 --> 01:08:04,830
| Tech
| Target is still alive! Tank battalion, resume attacks!
|-
| 01:08:01,381 --> 01:08:04,736
| Shinji
| You say it's the target...
|-
| 01:08:09,490 --> 01:08:11,516
| Shinji
| But Asuka's still inside. 
|-
| 01:08:15,129 --> 01:08:15,983
| Shinji
| Asuka is...
|-
| 01:08:39,650 --> 01:08:40,500
| Shinji
| Damn...
|-
| 01:08:42,392 --> 01:08:43,597
| Shinji
| An entry plug?
|-
| 01:08:43,632 --> 01:08:44,900
| Shinji
| She's still inside it. 
|-
| 01:09:20,819 --> 01:09:23,489
| Operator
| Corrosion occurring near the vertebral armor!
|-
| 01:09:23,490 --> 01:09:25,248
| Maya
| The contamination has penetrated 6,200 layers! 
|-
| 01:09:25,748 --> 01:09:28,914
| Fuyutsuki
| This type of invasion is giving us trouble.
|-
| 01:09:28,915 --> 01:09:31,143
| Operator
| Unit-01's A.T. Field is unstable.
|-
| 01:09:31,144 --> 01:09:33,020
| Maya
| There's a problem with the life support.
|-
| 01:09:33,021 --> 01:09:35,001
| Maya
| The pilot is in danger! 
|-
| 01:09:35,502 --> 01:09:38,486
| Fuyutsuki
| Damn! Cut the synchronization to 28%! 
|-
| 01:09:38,487 --> 01:09:39,487
| Gendo
| Wait.
|-
| 01:09:39,488 --> 01:09:42,405
| Fuyutsuki
| But Ikari, if this continues, the pilot will die. 
|-
| 01:09:42,406 --> 01:09:44,718
| Gendo
| Shinji, why don't you fight?
|-
| 01:09:46,044 --> 01:09:48,697
| Shinji
| Because... Asuka is still inside... Father. 
|-
| 01:09:48,698 --> 01:09:52,349
| Gendo
| It doesn't matter. It's an Angel. Our enemy. 
|-
| 01:09:52,350 --> 01:09:57,087
| Shinji
| But I can't do it. I can't just kill someone! 
|-
| 01:09:57,088 --> 01:09:58,088
| Gendo
| You will die.
|-
| 01:09:58,589 --> 01:10:02,014
| Shinji
| I don't care! It's better than killing Asuka! 
|-
| 01:10:02,015 --> 01:10:06,060
| Gendo
| Never mind. Cut all synchronization circuits between Unit-01 and the pilot! 
|-
| 01:10:06,061 --> 01:10:06,852
| Fuyutsuki
| Ikari!
|-
| 01:10:07,062 --> 01:10:08,062
| Maya
| Cut them, sir?
|-
| 01:10:08,063 --> 01:10:10,956
| Gendo
| Yes. Switch control over to the dummy system. 
|-
| 01:10:10,957 --> 01:10:14,034
| Maya
| But sir, the dummy system still has many problems.
|-
| 01:10:14,035 --> 01:10:16,635
| Maya
| And without Dr. Akagi's approval-
|-
| 01:10:16,636 --> 01:10:18,936
| Gendo
| It's still better than the current pilot.
|-
| 01:10:18,937 --> 01:10:19,937
| Gendo
| Do it!
|-
| 01:10:19,938 --> 01:10:20,938
| Maya
| Yes sir.
|}

html:

Page 1, Page 2, Page 4


Timestamp Speaker Dialogue
00:49:47,914 --> 00:49:50,880 Asuka If it's for that stupid Shinji then it should be a little mild, I guess...
00:49:51,881 --> 00:49:53,411 Misato I'm home!
00:49:53,412 --> 00:49:56,341 Asuka Huh? Misato, you're back early.
00:49:56,342 --> 00:49:58,885 Misato Yes, I just got back from Headquarters.
00:49:58,886 --> 00:50:01,032 Misato I'm going to bathe, change my clothes, then head back.
00:50:04,989 --> 00:50:07,299 Misato Well well, what do we have here?
00:50:07,300 --> 00:50:10,188 Misato Asuka, are you cooking dinner for Shin, too?
00:50:11,518 --> 00:50:14,515 Asuka That's not it! Uh, it's for that girl... what's-her-name, Hikari!
00:50:15,376 --> 00:50:18,476 Misato It's nice that Rei and even Asuka are becoming interested in the opposite sex.
00:50:18,511 --> 00:50:21,121 Asuka What do you mean? The favorite isn't doing this too, is she?!
00:50:21,122 --> 00:50:24,708 Misato Well, yeah. It seems that Rei has a long term project to finish.
00:50:25,185 --> 00:50:25,685 Asuka What's that?
00:50:26,525 --> 00:50:31,432 Misato She wants to play Cupid between Commander Ikari and Shin so they can develop a bond.
00:50:32,005 --> 00:50:36,425 Misato Her strategy is a home-cooked dinner.
00:50:36,426 --> 00:50:38,650 Misato It's an effective, straightforward way.
00:50:39,372 --> 00:50:44,137 Misato She really wants father and son to get along. It requires a lot of effort on her part.
00:50:44,138 --> 00:50:46,640 Asuka She's doing this for stupid Shinji...
00:50:46,675 --> 00:50:49,875 Misato It's kind of a surprise for Shin, so don't let him find out.
00:50:51,442 --> 00:50:53,600 Asuka Of course I'M not going to say anything!
00:51:16,681 --> 00:51:18,038 Misato Vanished?!
00:51:18,039 --> 00:51:21,351 Misato Eva Unit-04 and the entire Second Branch disappeared?!
00:51:21,838 --> 00:51:24,374 Aoba There's no data from ground zero.
00:51:25,847 --> 00:51:27,108 Misato This is awful.
00:51:27,109 --> 00:51:31,693 Hyuga We have satellite confirmation of the A.T. Field collapsing, but the details are unknown.
00:51:31,694 --> 00:51:34,419 Misato It seems Unit-04 was at the center of the explosion...
00:51:34,643 --> 00:51:36,909 Misato But our own Eva are okay, right?
00:51:36,910 --> 00:51:37,910 Maya Unit-04 was-
00:51:39,069 --> 00:51:45,738 Ritsuko The problems at the time of activation can be attributed to the fact that Unit-04 was a new type of self-contained testbed.
00:51:46,500 --> 00:51:47,440 Ritsuko ...Or so it seems.
00:51:47,441 --> 00:51:52,922 Maya The information from Nerv's North American branch is restricted, even for Dr. Akagi.
00:51:52,923 --> 00:51:53,923 Misato I'm aware of it...
00:51:54,797 --> 00:51:56,480 Fuyutsuki Eva Unit-04...
00:51:56,481 --> 00:52:01,075 Fuyutsuki The purpose of the experiment was to gather data about next generation development.
00:52:01,076 --> 00:52:04,791 Fuyutsuki It's not surprising that this happened, but...
00:52:07,809 --> 00:52:09,481 Kaji Was this really an accident?
00:52:11,701 --> 00:52:13,947 Toji Ma'am, three please!
00:52:17,167 --> 00:52:19,683 Shinji Toji, it's not like you to treat us.
00:52:19,684 --> 00:52:24,493 Toji Shinji, don't be so serious just 'cause I felt like treatin' you.
00:52:24,494 --> 00:52:28,122 Kensuke His sister's health is better. I guess that's why he's being nice.
00:52:28,622 --> 00:52:31,931 Toji Shut up! You don't need to tell him that much! Moron!
00:52:37,164 --> 00:52:38,655 Kensuke Hey, Ikari.
00:52:38,770 --> 00:52:39,336 Shinji Huh?
00:52:39,337 --> 00:52:41,727 Kensuke Isn't Unit-03 coming to Japan?
00:52:41,728 --> 00:52:44,043 Shinji Is it? I didn't know that.
00:52:44,044 --> 00:52:49,160 Kensuke It's rumored they're suddenly being forced to do the activation experiment by the United States.
00:52:49,161 --> 00:52:52,309 Kensuke Well, there's lots of unknown information on this end.
00:52:52,310 --> 00:52:54,220 Kensuke I just wonder who will pilot.
00:52:54,221 --> 00:52:56,978 Shinji I haven't heard anything about it.
00:52:58,056 --> 00:53:01,717 Kensuke Being a pilot sounds great! I wonder if I could become one?!
00:53:01,718 --> 00:53:05,262 Shinji Misato is the one who decides that, not me...
00:53:05,263 --> 00:53:06,568 Toji Damn! I lost.
00:53:17,335 --> 00:53:22,108 Seele Evangelion Unit-05 was recently lost.
00:53:22,109 --> 00:53:25,107 Seele Now Unit-04 has been lost, as well.
00:53:25,142 --> 00:53:29,973 Gendo The loss of both units will be a hindrance to the project's execution. However...
00:53:29,974 --> 00:53:31,444 Seele It is within the scope of amendment.
00:53:31,448 --> 00:53:32,949 Seele There won't be any problems.
00:53:32,950 --> 00:53:37,789 Seele The U.S. government has inevitably presented you with Unit-03.
00:53:37,824 --> 00:53:40,398 Seele Your country's government must cooperate.
00:53:40,433 --> 00:53:43,971 Seele It is a state-of-the-art unit, a formidable military force.
00:53:44,432 --> 00:53:47,099 Gendo Even now we are carrying out the Angels' annihilation.
00:53:47,100 --> 00:53:50,122 Gendo We cannot rely on an untested unit.
00:53:50,123 --> 00:53:54,511 Gendo If the supplemental revised budget for the repairs to Unit-00 could be approved-
00:53:54,512 --> 00:53:57,634 Seele The role of the prototype model is already ending.
00:53:57,635 --> 00:53:59,244 Seele There's no need.
00:53:59,519 --> 00:54:03,061 Seele Indeed, there are other matters that should be given priority.
00:54:02,728 --> 00:54:06,051 Seele The true Evangelion we desire...
00:54:06,052 --> 00:54:10,192 Seele With its birth and Lilith's resurrection, the hour of our covenant will arrive.
00:54:10,193 --> 00:54:14,881 Seele By then we must perform the necessary ceremonies.
00:54:14,882 --> 00:54:18,020 Seele For the Human Instrumentality Project.
00:54:18,021 --> 00:54:22,261 Gendo I understand. Everything will go according to Seele's scenario.
00:54:25,467 --> 00:54:27,121 Gendo The true Evangelion...
00:54:29,102 --> 00:54:34,737 Gendo Its completion will be ushered in by the current body containing Unit-01.
00:54:34,738 --> 00:54:37,557 Fuyutsuki The Mark-06, isn't it?
00:54:37,558 --> 00:54:42,995 Fuyutsuki This means what they are trying to create is not a false God, but a true God at last?
00:54:42,996 --> 00:54:43,996 Gendo Yes.
00:54:43,997 --> 00:54:47,856 Gendo We must hasten the awakening of Unit-01.
00:54:50,222 ---> 00:54:52,777 Operator Eva Unit-02's core unit separation complete.
00:54:52,849 --> 00:54:55,703 Asuka Why does my Unit-02 have to be sealed?!
00:54:55,704 --> 00:54:58,162 Ritsuko You know about the Vatican Treaty, don't you?
00:54:58,163 --> 00:55:00,620 Ritsuko This is the condition for us receiving Unit-03.
00:55:00,621 --> 00:55:03,534 Asuka If that's the case, you should put away Unit-00 since it's being repaired!
00:55:03,535 --> 00:55:07,381 Maya Europe hasn't given us clearance for possession of Unit-02.
00:55:07,382 --> 00:55:09,584 Maya Until that happens, there's nothing we can do.
00:55:09,585 --> 00:55:11,654 Ritsuko As of now, there is no pilot for it.
00:55:11,655 --> 00:55:15,441 Ritsuko Until we receive notice from the Europeans, we have to follow orders.
00:55:15,442 --> 00:55:18,228 Asuka With the exception of me piloting, you mean.
00:55:18,229 --> 00:55:19,811 Ritsuko The Evas are combat weapons.
00:55:19,812 --> 00:55:22,044 Ritsuko Everything has a backup prepared.
00:55:22,545 --> 00:55:24,404 Ritsuko Including the pilots.
00:55:24,513 --> 00:55:25,986 Asuka No way...
00:55:28,105 --> 00:55:31,460 Asuka There's no other place in world for me.
00:55:54,136 --> 00:55:57,248 Rei Eva is the mirror of your heart.
00:55:57,283 --> 00:55:58,555 Asuka What did you say?!
00:55:58,659 --> 00:56:03,524 Rei You shouldn't depend on the Eva.

You can be happy without piloting it.

00:56:03,802 --> 00:56:06,973 Asuka Stop being so arrogant just because you're the favorite!
00:56:08,486 --> 00:56:13,176 Asuka I'm a prodigy! I became an Eva pilot with my own strength, not with whom I know!
00:56:13,186 --> 00:56:15,630 Asuka I'm different from the rest of you!
00:56:15,665 --> 00:56:18,573 Rei I merely have a bond.
00:56:17,977 --> 00:56:21,004 Rei Eva bonds me to other people.
00:56:21,005 --> 00:56:27,532 Asuka Shut up! You're just an obedient little doll that does whatever Commander Ikari wants, aren't you?!
00:56:27,533 --> 00:56:29,364 Rei I am not a doll.
00:56:29,365 --> 00:56:30,861 Asuka You're a doll!
00:56:31,396 --> 00:56:32,876 Asuka Let me teach you a little something!
00:56:43,558 --> 00:56:46,672 Asuka You have a lot of energy for a doll.
00:56:53,768 --> 00:56:56,969 Asuka Just answer one thing for me. How do you feel about that idiot?
00:56:56,970 --> 00:56:58,247 Rei "Idiot"?
00:56:58,248 --> 00:57:00,711 Asuka When I say idiot, it's obvious I mean stupid Shinji.
00:57:00,712 --> 00:57:01,922 Rei Ikari-kun?
00:57:01,957 --> 00:57:04,450 Asuka So, how do you feel about him?
00:57:04,485 --> 00:57:05,964 Rei I don't really know...
00:57:06,448 --> 00:57:08,116 Asuka Why do Japanese have to be so...?!
00:57:08,151 --> 00:57:09,660 Asuka Just say what you feel already!
00:57:10,000 --> 00:57:15,253 Rei I don't know, but... I feel warm around Ikari-kun.
00:57:15,288 --> 00:57:19,451 Rei I want to feel warm towards him, as well.
00:57:19,486 --> 00:57:25,328 Rei I think I want to feel warm about him getting along with Commander Ikari.
00:57:25,329 --> 00:57:26,329 Asuka I get it.
00:57:32,648 --> 00:57:35,530 Asuka You really are a complete, ultra idiot.
00:57:35,565 --> 00:57:37,764 Asuka That means you love him!
00:57:43,380 --> 00:57:45,284 Shinji I'm looking forward to this dinner party.
00:57:46,176 --> 00:57:49,574 Shinji But I wonder if Ayanami's cooking will be okay?
00:57:52,457 --> 00:57:55,336 Shinji ...It'd be nice if father could come, too.
00:58:00,271 --> 00:58:03,156 Misato So this is the Dummy System...
00:58:03,157 --> 00:58:07,93 Hyuga It's only supposed to be a mere pilot aid, but it can independently exert control,
00:58:07,931 --> 00:58:11,170 Hyuga and generate an A.T. Field while unmanned.
00:58:10,992 --> 00:58:14,445 Hyuga Apparently it's more humane than forcing children to pilot.
00:58:18,794 --> 00:58:24,460 Misato This new Dummy System is really difficult to understand.
00:58:24,890 --> 00:58:29,720 Kaji Since it's coming from Golgotha Base, the details are still unknown.
00:58:31,918 --> 00:58:35,630 Misato To think something so dangerous will control the Eva... I don't like it!
00:58:35,631 --> 00:58:39,486 Kaji Do you think people should trust the Eva like that?
00:58:39,521 --> 00:58:42,366 Kaji It could give Shinji-kun confidence. No...
00:58:42,367 --> 00:58:45,378 Kaji It's for that reason he pilots, isn't it?
00:58:45,695 --> 00:58:51,761 Misato I'd prefer it if you had more information regarding the higher levels of Seele.
00:58:53,296 --> 00:58:56,237 Kaji Please don't go spying on their plans.
00:58:56,238 --> 00:58:57,238 Misato I don't intend to.
00:58:57,239 --> 00:59:02,155 Misato The Human Instrumentality Project... Why are they hiding it from Nerv?
00:59:02,156 --> 00:59:03,156 Kaji That's...
00:59:06,706 --> 00:59:08,638 Kaji I'd like to know that myself.
00:59:11,625 --> 00:59:15,525 Kaji We haven't dined together for a long time, and here we are talking about work.
00:59:16,105 --> 00:59:17,851 Misato It was different when we were students.
00:59:18,386 --> 00:59:22,575 Misato All these things are a damn burden.
00:59:22,576 --> 00:59:26,275 Kaji Selfish as we are, we cannot think only of ourselves.
00:59:26,276 --> 00:59:30,773 Misato Shinji and the others have much larger things to worry about.
00:59:30,808 --> 00:59:33,765 Kaji Yeah, the children carry a heavy burden.
00:59:33,766 --> 00:59:37,265 Kaji But, we still have to rely on them.
00:59:43,263 --> 00:59:44,508 Misato Yes...
00:59:45,535 --> 00:59:49,943 Misato Ah, I understand. I'll change the conclusion date.
00:59:51,020 --> 00:59:51,882 Kaji Rit-chan?
00:59:51,883 --> 00:59:55,640 Misato Yes. She's requesting I choose a test pilot for Unit-03.
00:59:55,641 --> 00:59:57,860 Kaji Personnel selection is your responsibility.
00:59:57,861 --> 01:00:02,970 Misato I'm aware of that, but the arrival of Unit-03 was postponed.
01:00:04,907 --> 01:00:06,470 Misato I just need one more day...
01:00:06,505 --> 01:00:09,788 Asuka Unit-03's test activation date...
01:00:10,933 --> 01:00:13,069 Asuka Isn't that date also the favorite's party?
01:00:36,771 --> 01:00:39,406 Ritsuko So, the decision lies with Asuka.
01:00:40,313 --> 01:00:43,639 Ritsuko Yeah, I'll be on the last flight to Matsushiro.
01:00:43,640 --> 01:00:45,528 Ritsuko Please take care, Maya.
01:00:45,529 --> 01:00:46,529 Maya Yes ma'am.
01:00:47,776 --> 01:00:49,807 Rei Umm, Dr. Akagi?
01:00:52,106 --> 01:00:54,406 Rei There is something I want you to tell the Second Girl.
01:00:55,395 --> 01:00:56,516 Rei Please.
01:01:05,338 --> 01:01:10,454 Tech You have one new message. First message...
01:01:11,883 --> 01:01:14,501 Ritsuko Alright, Rei. You can speak.
01:01:26,770 --> 01:01:27,952 Rei ...Thank you.
01:01:31,295 --> 01:01:33,359 Asuka Isn't she stupid!
01:01:33,360 --> 01:01:35,254 Asuka I just want to pilot Eva.
01:01:38,408 --> 01:01:42,650 Asuka If I like Unit-03, repaint it red.
01:01:45,940 --> 01:01:47,487 Hikari Good morning, Aida-kun.
01:01:47,570 --> 01:01:48,750 Kensuke Yes...
01:01:48,758 --> 01:01:50,624 Shinji Huh? Where's Toji?
01:01:50,625 --> 01:01:52,799 Kensuke At the Odawara Hospital today.
01:01:52,800 --> 01:01:55,468 Kensuke They discharged his little sister.
01:01:55,469 --> 01:01:57,510 Shinji Ah, I see.
01:01:57,927 --> 01:01:59,363 Kensuke I have a message from Toji.
01:01:59,364 --> 01:02:04,081 Kensuke "Thanks for thinking about my little sister!" is what he said.
01:02:05,608 --> 01:02:08,084 Kensuke It's really great, isn't it, Ikari.
01:02:08,560 --> 01:02:09,770 Shinji Yeah.
01:02:10,370 --> 01:02:13,673 Kensuke So, did you get invited to Ayanami's?
01:02:14,674 --> 01:02:16,880 Kensuke I really envy you!
01:02:25,527 --> 01:02:29,652 Tech Eva Unit-03 manned test activation director has arrived.
01:02:29,653 --> 01:02:31,631 Tech The current department supervisor has been relieved.
01:02:31,631 --> 01:02:35,050 Tech Restraint system checks complete.
01:02:33,460 --> 01:02:35,800 Tech Begin Umbilical Cable connection.
01:02:38,051 --> 01:02:39,814 Tech Connector connection confirmed.
01:02:39,815 --> 01:02:41,339 Tech Main energy source is loaded.
01:02:41,340 --> 01:02:43,040 Tech Internal voltage default values clear.
01:02:44,742 --> 01:02:47,181 Tech Entry plug is fixed in position.
01:02:47,182 --> 01:02:50,353 Tech Check list clear through 1350. No problems detected.
01:02:50,354 --> 01:02:52,457 Misato Roger. Begin countdown.
01:02:52,458 --> 01:02:53,458 Tech Begin countdown.
01:02:53,459 --> 01:02:55,687 Tech All ground crews evacuate.
01:02:55,688 --> 01:02:57,930 Tech Test pilot medical examinations complete.
01:02:57,965 --> 01:03:00,252 Tech She is currently waiting in the mobile control room.
01:03:00,253 --> 01:03:02,460 Misato It'll be a success for Ritsuko, there's no doubt.
01:03:06,429 --> 01:03:09,018 Misato A direct line? It must be Asuka.
01:03:12,236 --> 01:03:14,672 Misato What's wrong, Asuka? We have the test soon.
01:03:14,831 --> 01:03:18,153 Asuka I just wanted the two of us to chat, Misato.
01:03:18,654 --> 01:03:24,803 Misato Well, I never thanked you for before so, thank you.
01:03:27,763 --> 01:03:28,857 Asuka Thanking me is fine.
01:03:30,475 --> 01:03:34,252 Asuka It's my duty to help protect the ignorant masses since I'm an elite pilot.
01:03:34,253 --> 01:03:37,146 Asuka At first I didn't want to go to that dinner...
01:03:37,147 --> 01:03:40,913 Asuka Being with other people is fun, but it wears me out.
01:03:40,914 --> 01:03:46,523 Asuka I don't like to see other people happy but I like piloting Eva.
01:03:46,524 --> 01:03:51,452 Asuka I've always liked being alone, and I never needed close friends.
01:03:51,453 --> 01:03:54,604 Asuka Since the beginning, I've never had someone take care of me properly.
01:03:54,605 --> 01:03:59,740 Asuka At first, I felt that being the top pilot at Nerv meant I could go to that dinner.
01:03:59,741 --> 01:04:04,804 Asuka But now, I realize it's good to be around other people.
01:04:04,839 --> 01:04:07,586 Asuka Although it seems like I can't fit in.
01:04:07,587 --> 01:04:08,911 Misato That's not true.
01:04:08,912 --> 01:04:11,317 Misato You're a nice person, Asuka.
01:04:12,037 --> 01:04:17,088 Asuka I think this is the first time I've felt comfortable talking with you, Misato.
01:04:17,123 --> 01:04:21,276 Asuka I had no idea it could feel so good to get this off my chest.
01:04:21,277 --> 01:04:26,289 Misato This world is full of interesting things you need to learn.
01:04:26,290 --> 01:04:27,993 Misato You should have fun.
01:04:30,494 --> 01:04:33,736 Asuka Yeah. You're right. Thanks, Misato.
01:04:34,237 --> 01:04:39,369 Asuka By the way, I don't mind the red, but isn't this Test Plug Suit...
01:04:40,384 --> 01:04:41,895 Asuka revealing a bit too much?
01:04:42,575 --> 01:04:44,105 Tech Entry initiated...
01:04:44,106 --> 01:04:45,106 Tech Ionizing LCL. Pressure is nominal.

Begin First Stage connection.

01:04:45,107 --> 01:04:50,687 Tech No problems with plug sensors.

Numerical values are within measurement error range.

01:04:51,943 --> 01:04:55,451 Ritsuko Roger. Move onto Phase 2.
01:04:55,452 --> 01:04:57,058 Ritsuko Begin Second Stage connection.
01:04:57,059 --> 01:05:01,146 Asuka I see, I'm smiling now.
01:05:17,353 --> 01:05:18,760 Tech Plug depth is over 100.
01:05:18,761 --> 01:05:21,208 Tech Mental contamination is critical.
01:05:21,209 --> 01:05:22,209 Misato That fast?! How?
01:05:22,210 --> 01:05:24,014 Tech Pilot safety depth exceeded!
01:05:24,015 --> 01:05:27,654 Ritsuko Restrain it! This is as far as we can go without our crew dying!
01:05:27,655 --> 01:05:29,181 Misato Abort the test! Cut the circuit!
01:05:29,216 --> 01:05:32,151 Tech It's impossible! There's a high-energy reaction in the body!
01:05:33,153 --> 01:05:34,153 Ritsuko It can't be...
01:05:34,866 --> 01:05:35,892 Misato An Angel!
01:05:49,472 --> 01:05:51,814 Shinji An explosion in Matsushiro...?
01:05:59,015 --> 01:06:00,068 Fuyutsuki What's the situation?
01:06:00,069 --> 01:06:01,069 Aoba Unknown.
01:06:01,070 --> 01:06:04,380 Aoba The explosion was centered on the test cage. We've confirmed the destruction of the facilities.
01:06:04,381 --> 01:06:07,279 Fuyutsuki Send rescue teams and the Third Battalion. Take care of the situation before the JSSDF intervenes.
01:06:09,541 --> 01:06:10,443 Aoba Roger.
01:06:10,444 --> 01:06:13,535 Hyuga Unidentified moving object detected south-west of the epicenter.
01:06:13,536 --> 01:06:14,536 Hyuga Pattern orange.
01:06:14,537 --> 01:06:16,579 Hyuga We cannot confirm if it's an Angel.
01:06:17,115 --> 01:06:18,641 Gendo Level 1 battle stations.
01:06:18,642 --> 01:06:19,642 Fuyutsuki Ikari?!
01:06:19,643 --> 01:06:22,113 Gendo All hands, go to Level 1 battle stations.
01:06:22,569 --> 01:06:24,807 Gendo Unit-00 will remain in the repair cage.
01:06:24,808 --> 01:06:28,010 Gendo Launch Unit-01 with the Dummy Plug. We'll configure it later.
01:06:32,010 --> 01:06:35,760 Tech The fifth tank battalion has now advanced

to the eighteenth line of defense.

01:06:35,180 --> 01:06:39,010 Tech Main power extension cable connection work is

expected to be completed in two minutes.

01:06:39,010 --> 01:06:41,480 Tech Supporting mobile strike force deployment completed.
01:06:41,358 --> 01:06:43,845 Shinji Umm, what happened to Misato-san, Asuka, and the others?
01:06:41,650 --> 01:06:44,280 Tech Supporting aerial forces, standby for further orders.
01:06:43,846 --> 01:06:48,026 Aoba Right now the rescue teams are moving in. Don't worry about it.
01:06:48,061 --> 01:06:54,126 Shinji But how will we fight the Angel without Misato-san?
01:06:54,680 --> 01:06:59,832 Hyuga We are following the chain of command.

Commander Ikari is taking direct command.

01:06:59,833 --> 01:07:00,833 Shinji My father?
01:07:01,334 --> 01:07:02,664 Aoba Visual received from the Tou region.
01:07:02,665 --> 01:07:04,276 Aoba Transferring to the main monitor.
01:07:10,040 --> 01:07:11,314 Fuyutsuki Just as we thought.
01:07:11,315 --> 01:07:15,573 Gendo Transmit the deactivation signal. Force eject the entry plug.
01:07:18,188 --> 01:07:22,461 Maya It's no use! It doesn't recognize either the deactivation signal or the plug ejection code.
01:07:22,462 --> 01:07:25,775 Aoba An invasive structure that appears to be the core is confirmed surrounding the entry plug.
01:07:25,776 --> 01:07:28,277 Hyuga Pattern analysis is in! It's blue...
01:07:28,278 --> 01:07:32,638 Gendo Evangelion Unit-03 is hereby abandoned.
01:07:32,639 --> 01:07:35,773 Gendo Reclassify the target as the Ninth Angel.
01:07:36,401 --> 01:07:38,091 Operator Target is approaching.
01:07:38,092 --> 01:07:40,016 Operator All hands, prepare for surface combat.
01:07:40,017 --> 01:07:41,017 Aoba Surface-to-surface combat in progress.
01:07:43,560 --> 01:07:46,881 Shinji It can't be... an Angel? That's the Angel?
01:07:46,882 --> 01:07:49,409 Gendo Correct. That's the target.
01:07:49,410 --> 01:07:56,066 Shinji The target? But isn't that an Eva?
01:07:49,910 --> 01:07:52,300 Tech The target is now breaking through the second line of defense.
01:07:52,300 --> 01:07:54,630 Tech Fifth and sixth platoons, begin attack.
01:07:56,567 --> 01:07:57,712 Shinji It can't be...
01:07:58,184 --> 01:08:00,379 Gendo The target is advancing.
01:08:00,380 --> 01:08:01,380 Gendo You will defeat it.
01:08:01,320 --> 01:08:04,830 Tech Target is still alive! Tank battalion, resume attacks!
01:08:01,381 --> 01:08:04,736 Shinji You say it's the target...
01:08:09,490 --> 01:08:11,516 Shinji But Asuka's still inside.
01:08:15,129 --> 01:08:15,983 Shinji Asuka is...
01:08:39,650 --> 01:08:40,500 Shinji Damn...
01:08:42,392 --> 01:08:43,597 Shinji An entry plug?
01:08:43,632 --> 01:08:44,900 Shinji She's still inside it.
01:09:20,819 --> 01:09:23,489 Operator Corrosion occurring near the vertebral armor!
01:09:23,490 --> 01:09:25,248 Maya The contamination has penetrated 6,200 layers!
01:09:25,748 --> 01:09:28,914 Fuyutsuki This type of invasion is giving us trouble.
01:09:28,915 --> 01:09:31,143 Operator Unit-01's A.T. Field is unstable.
01:09:31,144 --> 01:09:33,020 Maya There's a problem with the life support.
01:09:33,021 --> 01:09:35,001 Maya The pilot is in danger!
01:09:35,502 --> 01:09:38,486 Fuyutsuki Damn! Cut the synchronization to 28%!
01:09:38,487 --> 01:09:39,487 Gendo Wait.
01:09:39,488 --> 01:09:42,405 Fuyutsuki But Ikari, if this continues, the pilot will die.
01:09:42,406 --> 01:09:44,718 Gendo Shinji, why don't you fight?
01:09:46,044 --> 01:09:48,697 Shinji Because... Asuka is still inside... Father.
01:09:48,698 --> 01:09:52,349 Gendo It doesn't matter. It's an Angel. Our enemy.
01:09:52,350 --> 01:09:57,087 Shinji But I can't do it. I can't just kill someone!
01:09:57,088 --> 01:09:58,088 Gendo You will die.
01:09:58,589 --> 01:10:02,014 Shinji I don't care! It's better than killing Asuka!
01:10:02,015 --> 01:10:06,060 Gendo Never mind. Cut all synchronization circuits between Unit-01 and the pilot!
01:10:06,061 --> 01:10:06,852 Fuyutsuki Ikari!
01:10:07,062 --> 01:10:08,062 Maya Cut them, sir?
01:10:08,063 --> 01:10:10,956 Gendo Yes. Switch control over to the dummy system.
01:10:10,957 --> 01:10:14,034 Maya But sir, the dummy system still has many problems.
01:10:14,035 --> 01:10:16,635 Maya And without Dr. Akagi's approval-
01:10:16,636 --> 01:10:18,936 Gendo It's still better than the current pilot.
01:10:18,937 --> 01:10:19,937 Gendo Do it!
01:10:19,938 --> 01:10:20,938 Maya Yes sir.

 Timestamp Speaker Dialogue 00:49:47,914 --> 00:49:50,880 Asuka If it's for that stupid Shinji then it should be a little mild, I guess...  00:49:51,881 --> 00:49:53,411 Misato	 I'm home! 00:49:53,412 --> 00:49:56,341 Asuka Huh? Misato, you're back early.  00:49:56,342 --> 00:49:58,885 Misato Yes, I just got back from Headquarters. 00:49:58,886 --> 00:50:01,032 Misato I'm going to bathe, change my clothes, then head back.  00:50:04,989 --> 00:50:07,299 Misato Well well, what do we have here? 00:50:07,300 --> 00:50:10,188 Misato Asuka, are you cooking dinner for Shin, too?  00:50:11,518 --> 00:50:14,515 Asuka That's not it! Uh, it's for that girl... what's-her-name, Hikari!  00:50:15,376 --> 00:50:18,476 Misato It's nice that Rei and even Asuka are becoming interested in the opposite sex. 00:50:18,511 --> 00:50:21,121 Asuka What do you mean? The favorite isn't doing this too, is she?!  00:50:21,122 --> 00:50:24,708 Misato Well, yeah. It seems that Rei has a long term project to finish.  00:50:25,185 --> 00:50:25,685 Asuka What's that? 00:50:26,525 --> 00:50:31,432 Misato She wants to play Cupid between Commander Ikari and Shin so they can develop a bond.  00:50:32,005 --> 00:50:36,425 Misato Her strategy is a home-cooked dinner. 00:50:36,426 --> 00:50:38,650 Misato It

Article: Evangelion 2.0 (Translation) Page 3
.  00:50:32,005 --> 00:50:36,425 Misato Her strategy is a home-cooked dinner. 00:50:36,426 --> 00:50:38,650 Misato It's an effective, straightforward way. 00:50:39,372 --> 00:50:44,137 Misato She really wants father and son to get along. It requires a lot of effort on her part. 00:50:44,138 --> 00:50:46,640 Asuka She's doing this for stupid Shinji... 00:50:46,675 --> 00:50:49,875 Misato It's kind of a surprise for Shin, so don't let him find out.  00:50:51,442 --> 00:50:53,600 Asuka Of course I'M not going to say anything!  00:51:16,681 --> 00:51:18,038 Misato Vanished?! 00:51:18,039 --> 00:51:21,351 Misato Eva Unit-04 and the entire Second Branch disappeared?! 00:51:21,838 --> 00:51:24,374 Aoba There's no data from ground zero.  00:51:25,847 --> 00:51:27,108 Misato This is awful. 00:51:27,109 --> 00:51:31,693 Hyuga We have satellite confirmation of the A.T. Field collapsing, but the details are unknown.  00:51:31,694 --> 00:51:34,419 Misato It seems Unit-04 was at the center of the explosion... 00:51:34,643 --> 00:51:36,909 Misato But our own Eva are okay, right? 00:51:36,910 --> 00:51:37,910 Maya Unit-04 was- 00:51:39,069 --> 00:51:45,738 Ritsuko The problems at the time of activation can be attributed to the fact that Unit-04 was a new type of self-contained testbed. 00:51:46,500 --> 00:51:47,440 Ritsuko ...Or so it seems. 00:51:47,441 --> 00:51:52,922 Maya The information from Nerv's

Article: Evangelion 2.0 (Translation) Page 3
 00:51:46,500 --> 00:51:47,440 Ritsuko ...Or so it seems. 00:51:47,441 --> 00:51:52,922 Maya The information from Nerv's North American branch is restricted, even for Dr. Akagi.  00:51:52,923 --> 00:51:53,923 Misato I'm aware of it... 00:51:54,797 --> 00:51:56,480 Fuyutsuki Eva Unit-04... 00:51:56,481 --> 00:52:01,075 Fuyutsuki The purpose of the experiment was to gather data about next generation development. 00:52:01,076 --> 00:52:04,791 Fuyutsuki It's not surprising that this happened, but...  00:52:07,809 --> 00:52:09,481 Kaji Was this really an accident? 00:52:11,701 --> 00:52:13,947 Toji Ma'am, three please! 00:52:17,167 --> 00:52:19,683 Shinji Toji, it's not like you to treat us.  00:52:19,684 --> 00:52:24,493 Toji Shinji, don't be so serious just 'cause I felt like treatin' you.  00:52:24,494 --> 00:52:28,122 Kensuke His sister's health is better. I guess that's why he's being nice.  00:52:28,622 --> 00:52:31,931 Toji Shut up! You don't need to tell him that much! Moron! 00:52:37,164 --> 00:52:38,655 Kensuke Hey, Ikari.  00:52:38,770 --> 00:52:39,336 Shinji Huh? 00:52:39,337 --> 00:52:41,727 Kensuke Isn't Unit-03 coming to Japan?  00:52:41,728 --> 00:52:44,043 Shinji  Is it? I didn't know that.  00:52:44,044 --> 00:52:49,160 Kensuke It's rumored they're suddenly being forced to do the activation

Article: Evangelion 2.0 (Translation) Page 3
:52:44,043 Shinji  Is it? I didn't know that.  00:52:44,044 --> 00:52:49,160 Kensuke It's rumored they're suddenly being forced to do the activation experiment by the United States. 00:52:49,161 --> 00:52:52,309 Kensuke Well, there's lots of unknown information on this end. 00:52:52,310 --> 00:52:54,220 Kensuke I just wonder who will pilot.  00:52:54,221 --> 00:52:56,978 Shinji I haven't heard anything about it.  00:52:58,056 --> 00:53:01,717 Kensuke Being a pilot sounds great! I wonder if I could become one?! 00:53:01,718 --> 00:53:05,262 Shinji Misato is the one who decides that, not me... 00:53:05,263 --> 00:53:06,568 Toji Damn! I lost.  00:53:17,335 --> 00:53:22,108 Seele Evangelion Unit-05 was recently lost.  00:53:22,109 --> 00:53:25,107 Seele Now Unit-04 has been lost, as well. 00:53:25,142 --> 00:53:29,973 Gendo The loss of both units will be a hindrance to the project's execution. However...  00:53:29,974 --> 00:53:31,444 Seele It is within the scope of amendment.  00:53:31,448 --> 00:53:32,949 Seele There won't be any problems. 00:53:32,950 --> 00:53:37,789 Seele The U.S. government has inevitably presented you with Unit-03.  00:53:37,824 --> 00:53:40,398 Seele Your country's government must cooperate.  00:53:40,433 --> 00:53:43,971 Seele It is a state-of-the-art unit, a formidable military force. 00:53:44,432 --> 00:53:47,099 Gendo Even now we are carrying out the Angels' annihilation.  00:53

Article: Evangelion 2.0 (Translation) Page 3
 It is a state-of-the-art unit, a formidable military force. 00:53:44,432 --> 00:53:47,099 Gendo Even now we are carrying out the Angels' annihilation.  00:53:47,100 --> 00:53:50,122 Gendo We cannot rely on an untested unit. 00:53:50,123 --> 00:53:54,511 Gendo If the supplemental revised budget for the repairs to Unit-00 could be approved- 00:53:54,512 --> 00:53:57,634 Seele The role of the prototype model is already ending. 00:53:57,635 --> 00:53:59,244 Seele There's no need. 00:53:59,519 --> 00:54:03,061 Seele Indeed, there are other matters that should be given priority.  00:54:02,728 --> 00:54:06,051 Seele The true Evangelion we desire... 00:54:06,052 --> 00:54:10,192 Seele With its birth and Lilith's resurrection, the hour of our covenant will arrive. 00:54:10,193 --> 00:54:14,881 Seele By then we must perform the necessary ceremonies.  00:54:14,882 --> 00:54:18,020 Seele For the Human Instrumentality Project.  00:54:18,021 --> 00:54:22,261 Gendo I understand. Everything will go according to Seele's scenario. 00:54:25,467 --> 00:54:27,121 Gendo The true Evangelion... 00:54:29,102 --> 00:54:34,737 Gendo Its completion will be ushered in by the current body containing Unit-01.  00:54:34,738 --> 00:54:37,557 Fuyutsuki The Mark-06, isn't it? 00:54:37,558 --> 00:54:42,995 Fuyutsuki This means what they are trying to create is not a false God, but a true God at last? 00:54:42,996 --> 00:54:43,996 Gendo Yes. 00:54:43,997 --> 00:54:47

Article: Evangelion 2.0 (Translation) Page 3
 create is not a false God, but a true God at last? 00:54:42,996 --> 00:54:43,996 Gendo Yes. 00:54:43,997 --> 00:54:47,856 Gendo We must hasten the awakening of Unit-01. 00:54:50,222 ---> 00:54:52,777 Operator Eva Unit-02's core unit separation complete. 00:54:52,849 --> 00:54:55,703 Asuka Why does my Unit-02 have to be sealed?!  00:54:55,704 --> 00:54:58,162 Ritsuko You know about the Vatican Treaty, don't you?  00:54:58,163 --> 00:55:00,620 Ritsuko This is the condition for us receiving Unit-03.  00:55:00,621 --> 00:55:03,534 Asuka If that's the case, you should put away Unit-00 since it's being repaired!  00:55:03,535 --> 00:55:07,381 Maya Europe hasn't given us clearance for possession of Unit-02.  00:55:07,382 --> 00:55:09,584 Maya Until that happens, there's nothing we can do.  00:55:09,585 --> 00:55:11,654 Ritsuko As of now, there is no pilot for it. 00:55:11,655 --> 00:55:15,441 Ritsuko Until we receive notice from the Europeans, we have to follow orders. 00:55:15,442 --> 00:55:18,228 Asuka With the exception of me piloting, you mean.  00:55:18,229 --> 00:55:19,811 Ritsuko The Evas are combat weapons.  00:55:19,812 --> 00:55:22,044 Ritsuko Everything has a backup prepared. 00:55:22,545 --> 00:55:24,404 Ritsuko Including the pilots. 00:55:24,513 --> 00:55:25,986 Asuka No way... 00:55:28,105 --> 00:55:31,460 Asuka There's no other place in world for

Article: Evangelion 2.0 (Translation) Page 3
